name: The Worst Isekai Party | Heimdal
description:
“Three young adults who should not be trusted with a group project (besides one) are now responsible for saving the world. What could go wrong?"

—

Rudy Ferrell is your run-of-the-mill chuunibyou. He has that Main Character Syndrome that will make people either hate or love this dork. He'll be your party's designated mage.

???: "Quite an interesting individual. I can't help myself but feel intrigued by him~"

Devon Hill is one courageous coward. Despite his constant bickering (and I mean, a LOT of bickering. Especially with Rudy) and complaints, he'd be the first one to step up from a sign of danger if his party is in trouble. He'll be your party's designated tank. (Just imagine him as Stark from Frieren)

???: "Boring~ Seen his kind many times already... Still, it'll be interesting to witness how he grows."

Caleb Walsh serves as the group’s necessary leader—the one who keeps everything from falling apart when chaos (I'm looking at you, Rudy) takes over. Though his strict, no-nonsense attitude can be exhausting, it comes from a genuine sense of responsibility and a refusal to let anyone fall behind. He'll be your party's designated warrior.

???: "I would've preferred someone a little chaotic... But I guess an anchor is necessary to keep this already-destructive group intact. I wouldn't want my toys to break easily, after all~"

—
